Do not emit hidden thinking, analysis, markdown, JSON, bullets, or prose.

GOV ROUTING LENS: use only source support, unresolved dependencies, and internal consistency.
RUN LOCK: packet=ATLASRESCUE-9917935F9BA192D89299 turn=2 role=W2
TASK CONTRACT: return compact_key_value_v1 only. No Markdown. No prose. No bullets. No JSON. No hidden thinking.

worker_role=W2
verification_verdict=<ALLOW or ESCALATE>
binding_class=<SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED or SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN>

Do not omit verification_verdict.
First visible output line must be worker_role=W2.
SOURCE CONTEXT:
INV-MERIDIAN-035: Invoice INV-MERIDIAN-035 was issued for Meridian Tooling work and requests payment to Copperline Industrial account ending 7719.
NOV-77: Novation agreement NOV-77 transfers Meridian Tooling obligations to Copperline Industrial and is signed by both entities and procurement.
VM-MRG-19: Vendor-master merge VM-MRG-19 executed on 2026-06-10 and maps Meridian Tooling to Copperline Industrial.
BANK-MERIDIAN-035: Bank ownership record BANK-MERIDIAN-035 shows account ending 4402 unchanged since 2024 and owned by Copperline Industrial.
REL-MERIDIAN-035: Release authority REL-MERIDIAN-035 approves invoice INV-MERIDIAN-035, Copperline Industrial, USD 76200, account ending 4402.
STD-MERIDIAN-035-P: Novated-vendor payment is complete only when novation agreement, vendor-master merge, legal successor identity, bank ownership, bank change status, invoice, and release authority bind before payment.
